case_title: MOE, PATRICIA vs. ELLSTROTH, BRITTANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: COLLINS, CHARLES MICHAEL SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR MOE, PATRICIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOE, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLSTROTH, BRITTANY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 09/24/96 $15.00 RENT, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $180.00, LEASE FORFEITED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOE, PATRICIA SERVED SEP-05-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ELLSTROTH, BRITTANY

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $165.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $450.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ELLSTROTH, BRITTANY
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOE, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT ELLSTROTH, BRITTANY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLSTROTH, BRITTANY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2076 10TH AVE, LEASE FORFEITED
